response.global_analysis: The video features a 3D virtual live performance of the song 'Gira Gira' by Ouro Kronii. The audio starts mid-verse, skipping the first few lines of the provided reference JSON. I used on-screen text to correct errors in the reference JSON (e.g., '蓋' instead of '豚'). Timing is strictly synchronized with the vocal audio. Subtitles include the song lyrics and the post-performance disclaimer text.

subtitles.original: だのに人を好きって思う気持ちだけは
subtitles.english: And yet, this feeling of wanting to love another

subtitles.original: 一丁前にあるから悶えてるんでしょう
subtitles.english: Is what makes me suffer so

subtitles.original: Ugly 正直言って私の顔は
subtitles.english: Ugly, honestly, my face is as if

subtitles.original: そう神様が左手で描いたみたい
subtitles.english: It were drawn by God with His left hand

subtitles.original: 必然この世にある ラブソングは
subtitles.english: Therefore, the love songs in this world...

subtitles.original: どれ一つ絶対私向けなんかじゃないでしょ
subtitles.english: Not a single one is meant for me, right?
